## Preserved prior README notes

<!-- PRESERVED PRIOR README START -->
# method-maps

This folder contains shared normalization dictionaries for method names.

These files keep the public method taxonomy stable when model responses
use different aliases, phrasings, or control-prompt names for the same
proof family.

## Files

- `method_labels.csv`: canonical method labels used by normalization,
  scoring, and analytics.
- `method_renames.csv`: alias-to-canonical mapping for method names
  observed in extracted responses.
- `fruit_primary_method.csv`: mapping support for the Test 01 Fruit
  control, where constructor names are changed but the public method
  taxonomy remains the same.
- `methods_decision.md`: notes on how method classes are grouped and
  interpreted.

These maps are provenance aids. The released CSVs already contain the
normalized fields produced from them.
<!-- PRESERVED PRIOR README END -->
